title: Gather Required Fault Information Before Entering the Grid for AGV Recovery
summary: Collect the source-required AGV and RMS details before going inside the grid (Dance Floor) to perform fault recovery.
when_to_use: Use before going inside the grid (also called the Dance Floor) for AGV fault recovery, to ensure the required Robot ID, RMS fault description, bin/tote status, tote ID when applicable, and under-rack empty-AGV zone status have been gathered.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as the physical AGV recovery procedure inside the grid.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Gather and confirm the required AGV and RMS fault information before entering the grid for recovery work.

safety_notes: Entering the grid (Dance Floor) implies elevated operational risk per the candidate context.
Before going inside the grid, make sure to have the required Robot ID, fault description from RMS, bin/tote status, tote ID when applicable, and under-rack empty-AGV zone status.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.
access_or_tools_needed: Ability to identify the faulted AGV and Robot ID
Access to zone and AGV status information

access_required: Access to zone and AGV status information
system_preconditions: A faulted AGV has been identified for recovery preparation before entering the grid.

visual_references.description: AGV fault screen on page 89 associated with fault recovery and useful for locating Robot ID, RMS fault description, tote ID, and under-rack AGV status context.
AGV API Controls screen reference that may help identify AGV details and status context during recovery preparation.
Fault recovery screen related to no-empty-AGV zone conditions, relevant to checking whether an under-rack AGV is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Identify the Robot ID for the faulted AGV
steps.purpose: Ensure the specific faulted AGV is correctly identified before any grid entry or recovery activity.
steps.instruction: Identify and record the Robot ID for the faulted AGV before going inside the grid.
steps.expected_result: The Robot ID for the faulted AGV is known and recorded.
steps.healthy_condition: A single faulted AGV is clearly identified and its Robot ID is available for recovery preparation.
steps.failure_condition: The faulted AGV cannot be confidently matched to a Robot ID.

actions.label: Identify faulted AGV Robot ID
actions.exact_action: Identify the Robot ID for the faulted AGV.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the AGV fault interface context associated with Robot ID and fault recovery information.
Look for AGV details/status context that may support identifying the affected AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Robot ID for the faulted AGV cannot be confirmed.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Obtain the fault description from RMS
steps.purpose: Capture the system-reported fault information needed to prepare for recovery.
steps.instruction: Access RMS and obtain the fault description for the faulted AGV.
steps.expected_result: The RMS fault description for the faulted AGV is available and recorded.
steps.healthy_condition: The RMS fault description is visible and clearly associated with the identified faulted AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The RMS fault description is unavailable, unclear, or cannot be matched to the faulted AGV.

actions.label: Review RMS fault description
actions.exact_action: Obtain the fault description from RMS.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the AGV fault screen context referenced for RMS fault description during fault recovery.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the RMS fault description cannot be confirmed.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Check whether RMS indicates the AGV is holding a bin
steps.purpose: Determine whether tote/bin handling information must also be captured before recovery.
steps.instruction: Check in RMS whether the faulted AGV is indicated as holding a bin.
steps.expected_result: The bin/tote holding status of the faulted AGV is known.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS clearly indicates whether the faulted AGV is or is not holding a bin.
steps.failure_condition: The bin/tote holding status cannot be determined from RMS.

actions.label: Check AGV bin status in RMS
actions.exact_action: Check whether RMS indicates that the faulted AGV is holding a bin.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for fault recovery screen context related to RMS fault and tote/bin status.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if RMS does not clearly indicate whether the AGV is holding a bin.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Record the tote ID if the AGV is holding a bin
steps.purpose: Capture the tote identifier required when the faulted AGV is carrying a bin/tote.
steps.instruction: If RMS indicates the faulted AGV is holding a bin, record the tote ID.
steps.expected_result: The tote ID is recorded when the faulted AGV is holding a bin.
steps.healthy_condition: A tote ID is documented for a faulted AGV that RMS shows as holding a bin, or the step is not applicable because no bin is held.
steps.failure_condition: RMS indicates the AGV is holding a bin, but the tote ID cannot be determined.

actions.label: Record tote ID
actions.exact_action: If RMS indicates the AGV is holding a bin, record the tote ID.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for screen context related to tote ID during AGV fault recovery.
Look for a faulted AGV with tote context that may help interpret tote-related recovery information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the AGV is shown as holding a bin but the tote ID cannot be confirmed.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Verify under-rack empty-AGV zone status when applicable
steps.purpose: Determine whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone, as required before grid entry.
steps.instruction: If the faulted AGV is under a rack, verify whether that AGV is the empty AGV for that zone.
steps.expected_result: The under-rack empty-AGV zone status is confirmed when applicable.
steps.healthy_condition: For an AGV under a rack, it is known whether that AGV is the empty AGV for the zone; otherwise the step is not applicable.
steps.failure_condition: The empty-AGV status for the zone cannot be confirmed for a faulted AGV under a rack.

actions.label: Verify empty AGV for zone
actions.exact_action: If the faulted AGV is under a rack, verify whether that AGV is the empty AGV for that zone.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for no-empty-AGV zone context relevant to determining whether the under-rack AGV is the empty AGV for that zone.
Look for AGV positioning and zone context that may help interpret under-rack AGV status.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the faulted AGV is under a rack and its empty-AGV zone status cannot be confirmed.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

steps.title: Confirm all required information before entering the grid
steps.purpose: Perform a final completeness check so grid entry does not begin without the required recovery information.
steps.instruction: Confirm that you have the Robot ID, RMS fault description, bin/tote status, tote ID when applicable, and under-rack empty-AGV zone status when applicable before going inside the grid.
steps.expected_result: All source-required pre-entry information has been collected and confirmed.
steps.healthy_condition: The required information set is complete and ready for use during AGV recovery.
steps.failure_condition: Any required information is missing, unverified, or inconsistent.

actions.label: Confirm pre-entry information set
actions.exact_action: Confirm the collected information before going inside the grid (the Dance Floor).

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use as a reference for AGV fault recovery context while confirming the collected information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if any required information is missing or cannot be confirmed.
Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.
The source does not provide further action if any required information cannot be confirmed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

success_criteria: The Robot ID for the faulted AGV is documented.
The RMS fault description is documented.
The AGV bin/tote holding status is documented.
The tote ID is documented when RMS indicates the AGV is holding a bin.
The under-rack empty-AGV zone status is documented when applicable.
The information is confirmed before entering the grid.
healthy_conditions: Required pre-entry fault recovery information is complete before going inside the grid.
The identified AGV, RMS fault description, tote/bin status, and zone status are consistent and usable for recovery preparation.
failure_conditions: RMS fault description cannot be obtained.
Bin/tote holding status cannot be determined.
Tote ID cannot be confirmed when the AGV is holding a bin.
Under-rack empty-AGV zone status cannot be confirmed when applicable.
Any required information is missing before grid entry.
escalation_guidance: Do not proceed into the grid without the documented information.
If any required information cannot be confirmed, stop and seek SME review because the source does not provide further action.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV fault recovery screen context on the same page as the fault recovery guidance.
AGV API Controls reference for AGV details and status context.
No-empty-AGV zone screen context relevant to under-rack zone status checks.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether RMS thinks the faulted AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether a faulted AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide the exact RMS navigation path or screen sequence for locating the Robot ID and fault description.
The source packet does not specify how to determine under-rack empty-AGV zone status beyond requiring that it be known before entry.
The source packet does not provide further action if any required information cannot be confirmed.
The source packet does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source packet does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required for this information-gathering procedure.
